content.en:
The ruins of the Sunset Sect.

A Famous Dao Ancestor incarnation and the True Monarchs poured in and were attacking a killing array.

In the past, the formations that Ye Tian encountered were all large formations that were not controlled, and the threat power was reduced by more than ten times, and the formations were rigid, which was not too much of a threat at all.

But now, the Sunset Sect's large array is controlled by someone, and the power of this large array is very strong, and a single Dao Ancestor incarnation can't compete with this big array at all.

But many Dao Ancestor incarnations plus hundreds of millions of True Monarchs attacked the Great Array together, and soon destroyed this Great Array.

However, the ruins of the Sunset Sect are too big and too big, and the formations here are endless, and they are varied, no matter how strong the Dao Ancestor incarnations are, it will be difficult to break all the formations for a while.

Ye Tian followed the army and also entered the Sunset Sect.

The scale of the Sunset Sect is far superior to that of the Heaven Splitting Sect, and it can be seen from the scale of the sect that the strength of the Sunset Sect is far superior to that of the Heaven Splitting Sect.

After all, one is the Triple Heaven Force, and the other is the Quadruple Heaven Force, which seems to be only one Heaven apart, but it is a huge gap between the Lower Triple Heaven and the Middle Triple Heaven Force.

With the Sunset Sect's large array being breached, many buildings have been patronized by countless strong people, and the treasures and resources inside have been plundered one by one, although there are small frictions among the true monarchs during this period, but because there are too many true monarchs here, there are even a large number of Dao Ancestor incarnations present, so it is not good to really fight, otherwise once the battle fluctuations affect the Dao Ancestor incarnation, it is looking for death!

However, the Sunset Sect was full of dangers, and some secret killing arrays were hidden in the halls and attics, and the true monarchs did not know the situation, so they strayed into it and were killed instantly by the killing array.

As a result, many True Monarchs fell and died one by one, but many more True Monarchs gained a lot.

Just as the powerhouses of the major forces were advancing the Sunset Sect step by step, in a hidden space in the depths of the Sunset Sect, consciousness was communicating with each other.

"Damn, this group of greedy Otherworldly Realm cultivators has actually attacked our Sunset Sect!"

"If it weren't for the fact that we fell into this strange realm with the fragments of the domain realm, one by one, we would have fallen asleep one by one, and we wouldn't have had time to arrange the means, otherwise we would have casually arranged our Sunset Sect, and these people wouldn't have thought of joining our Sunset Sect at all!"

"What to do, let's hide here, even if they annihilate the Sunset Sect, they won't be able to find our sleeping place, but the Sunset Sect is our hard work, and it must not be destroyed by them. "

"But we are only a preliminary wisp of consciousness awakened now, the body is still sleeping, and even if we wake up now, there is no way to get out, the origin of the Chaos Avenue has protection against the Dao Realm, unless we destroy the Quasi-Dao Realm in the outside world, but if it is inside, no matter how strong we are, we will not be able to violate the rules of the origin of the Chaos Dao, once we are forcibly born, under the backlash, even the Dao Ancestor will fall or be severely damaged!"

"We can't be born, but if the True Ancestor disciples can be born and hold on for a while, it's better to forcibly let some True Ancestor disciples wake up, they are barely alive under our protection, it's time for them to serve!"

"You're crazy, in this way, those True Ancestor disciples may not survive, and they will all have to die. The True Ancestor disciples who can survive are all geniuses, and they can all be cultivated well, and it will not be difficult to become a True Ancestor in the future!"

"Don't forget, most of the True Ancestor disciples were severely damaged when they passed through the Dark Forbidden Realm, and we could save their lives, but it was difficult to protect their origin. Now, their Origin is so badly damaged that it will take a great deal to repair it. In this case, it is better to let them play their due use!"

"Hmph, if you want to forcibly wake up, it's up to you, I won't do it. When the sect master wakes up in the future, he will definitely reprimand you for your actions!"

"If I protect the Sunset Sect, the sect master will only praise me, but will not reprimand me!"

......

The Dao Ancestor incarnations and countless True Monarchs didn't know that the Dao Ancestor of the Sunset Sect and a large number of True Ancestor disciples were sleeping in a mysterious space of the Sunset Sect, otherwise they might not dare to invade here.

"It seems a little uneasy, is it dangerous?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Instead of rushing to the front, he kept dangling from behind.

Although the Sunset Sect is a fourfold heaven force, he doesn't gain much, because there are too many True Monarchs who rush in, and with so many True Monarchs to share, he will naturally not have too many benefits alone.

The real treasure must be in the core area of the Sunset Sect, and once an amazing treasure really appears, the Dao Ancestor incarnations will inevitably fight.

The incarnations of the Dao Ancestors who came this time were not simple, and there were even the incarnations of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Ye Tian thought that his strength was very strong, but at most he dared to fight with the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation, but he did not dare to provoke the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation.

What's more, on such an occasion, the four Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnations may all come down at any time.

Suddenly.

The sunset void shook, and a depressing aura permeated the entire Sunset Sect.

"What's going on?"

Tuolong was slightly startled.

Two half-step True Ancestor guards protected it.

Ye Tian was also extremely dignified and made a plan to retreat at any time.

Rumble!!!!

The void cracked, and a figure stepped out.

When this person appeared, golden chains appeared out of thin air, locked on this person's body, constantly suppressing the other party, and even this piece of heaven and earth was struggling to suppress the other party.

"True Ancestor!"

Everyone felt the breath of this person, and they were surprised one by one.

This is the first True Ancestor on the battlefield ruins, and it can even be said that it is the first True Ancestor in the Quasi-Dao Realm!

After all, even the Dao Ancestor incarnation was only a half-step True Ancestor from the perspective of cultivation, and it had not reached the True Ancestor level.

"True Ancestor dares to forcibly descend on the battlefield ruins? Is this looking for death? During this period, True Ancestor forcibly descended, and the Origin Rebellion was enough to kill him!"

There is a Dao Ancestor incarnation who wondered.

"No, he is not the true ancestor of our realm, he is the true ancestor of the Sunset Sect, you look at his clothes, it is the clothes of the true disciples of the Sunset Sect!" a Dao Ancestor incarnation was shocked.

"What, the true ancestor of the Sunset Sect, there are really people alive in the Domain Fragments!!!"

Countless true monarchs are incomparable, they can't be believed!

"You dare to invade the Sunset Sect, and force me to forcibly wake up, you are looking for death!"

This True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect was furious.

The Origin is fighting back, the Origin Chain is suppressing him at the moment, and he will definitely die if he persists for an hour at most.

Originally, he would have survived as long as he had spent this period of time, but now it was all in vain.

Although it was the Dao Ancestors of the Sunset Sect who forcibly awakened him, he did not dare to resent the Dao Ancestors of the Sunset Sect, so he could only vent all his anger on these Otherworldly Domain cultivators.
